{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322054543BCB5F321326937FED081\"}"},"total":2533},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7228069327432336186","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很舒服，很纯粹。虽然是末日，但并没有执着于非得人心险恶你死我活的黑暗风。绝境里有大恶也就有大善。张文书便是善意的凝聚，他笑称自己是圣母，但其实是圣人。\n另外文风描写的也好。写食物就细细描写，看得人口齿生津；写打斗场景呢，从陆沉沉和薛甜甜单刀对丧尸到狗子们围猎，很多描写都让人幻视是武侠小说，自有一股侠气。我没想到在末日文里能看出“侠”味，真的很独特的体验。\n一口气看到这里，好看，喜欢。","text_exts":[{"e":144,"s":140,"text":"武侠小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%AD%A6%E4%BE%A0%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177412954337FED081%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227228069327432336186%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227176902415969422368%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AD%A6%E4%BE%A0%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682916127,"group_id":"7176902415969422368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我要吃葡挞蛋挞泡芙蛋糕曲奇饼甜甜圈松糕米糕马拉糕流沙包叉烧酥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6flJcUg1sV9v/ibiD1ALVk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00fe6d4a901046d4bdf676d91d8fb956~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776705179\u0026x-signature=H1eAgm6byPboY9t37GDXmnoit40%3D","user_id":"53252092079","user_name":"没有人会拒绝葡式蛋挞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53252092079","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7176902415969422368","book_info":{"abstract":"末世的幸存者们，度过煎熬的时光，填饱肚子之余，在荒野里寻找丢失的尊严，捡拾文明的记忆，努力向着希望的方向跋涉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81d6854aa66b94a7b208898a650d3ead","author":"张秋枫","author_id":"","book_id":"7176902415969422368","book_name":"末世：开局荒野求生","book_short_name":"末世大先生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68\u0026name=末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":379,\"name\":\"求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379\u0026name=求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":493,\"name\":\"钓鱼\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=493\u0026name=钓鱼\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":494,\"name\":\"囤物资\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494\u0026name=囤物资\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":515,\"name\":\"末日求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515\u0026name=末日求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7177614844127150652","read_count":"76114","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1495545"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"627","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生,钓鱼,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/055c36c7a11a366347f2e441a48e1da7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779313543\u0026x-signature=wZdE%2Fu3kG%2BqBolN1f5kDWr%2F%2BBLM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1121142167308286","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.0412549e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322054543BCB5F321326937FED081\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":283,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20412,"reply_count":10,"show_pv":255461},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1682916825,"author_reply_time":1682916794,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7304186204093563687","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是末日文中比较有代表的作品了，写实类画风（但是最近几章有变异的征兆），末世必须重启生产劳动，人类也必须走向群居生活，从最开始的集体生产开始一步一步走向私有制。主角的眼光长远，又带了一群好跟班，走在了正确的道路上，循环【生产➡收获➡扩大➡打架】的路线，可预见的后续情节不会有太多亮点。作者估计也是在苦苦思考后续世界观和架构，导致现在更新不动了。实在是苦了大家啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700641020,"group_id":"7176902415969422368","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+hX7+vjXBkOcEHxpxsK4g=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6252ee26eebb460698c4dbb99184d099~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776703595\u0026x-signature=lWR5MgxHuEIdcte1OUmkUvhtNlM%3D","user_id":"102809349910","user_name":"格调de烟花肆意"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102809349910","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7176902415969422368","book_info":{"abstract":"末世的幸存者们，度过煎熬的时光，填饱肚子之余，在荒野里寻找丢失的尊严，捡拾文明的记忆，努力向着希望的方向跋涉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/81d6854aa66b94a7b208898a650d3e
